Sent: Wednesday, April 22, 2026 1:30 PM
To: Ezhilan, Priya <ezhilanf@amazon.com>
Cc: Mukherjee, Suchetana <suchemu@amazon.com>; PluginHive Support <support@pluginhive.com>; yosnacko@gmail.com
Subject: RE: [EXTERNAL] API integration

 

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you can confirm the sender and know the content is safe.

 

Hi Priya, 

 

There seems to have been some confusion, as the charges were not communicated earlier and the customer was expecting a free solution. 

 

That said, I assisted with integrating Amazon Shipping into Shopify. At the moment, the SWA account balance is insufficient to generate a shipping label. Suggested the shipper to recharge so we can try generating the label. 

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive)

comments.body:
Hi Priya,



It appears that the shipper’s account has been restricted from accessing the API due to an insufficient credit balance.



_**Error:**"Unable to print due to insufficient credit balance. Please visit Shipper Central to pay your balance or reach out to your account manager for assistance.”_



Please let us know if you need any help from our end.



Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

Request #385282 "Welcome to Shopify Partner Plugi..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #385282:

Hello My,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on 1wwevx-xc.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hi Priya,


The integration has already been completed from our end. However, the same error still persists while generating the label: "Unable to print due to insufficient credit balance. Please visit Shipper Central to pay your balance or reach out to your account manager for assistance.”



Since this response is coming directly from the Amazon Shipping API, there isn’t anything further we can control or override from our side.



Could you please have your tech team check this once?


Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn
comments.html_body:
Hi Priya, 

The integration has already been completed from our end. However, the same error still persists while generating the label: "Unable to print due to insufficient credit balance. Please visit Shipper Central to pay your balance or reach out to your account manager for assistance.” 

Since this response is coming directly from the Amazon Shipping API, there isn’t anything further we can control or override from our side. 

Could you please have your tech team check this once?

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

comments.body:
Hi Team,

Please raise a request in the Amazon Shipping Slack channel and ask the Amazon Tech team to look into this at the earliest.

Kindly tag Shruti, Manomay, Anwesha, and me. Also, please share both the request and the response directly in the message (not as a Zip file).

(Abhilash)
